config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmDeXuatPhoiAdd5
Nút WinForms gốc: Đóng · Lưu lại · Duyệt đề xuất · Hủy đề xuất
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_DANHSACH_DEXUAT_GET, TR_DANHSACH_DEXUAT_PROCESS_GETALL, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_DELETE, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_GET, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_GETALL, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_INSERT, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_UPDATE, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_GETBYID, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_NEWID, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_UPDATE, TR_DONDATHANG_GETLISTHTR, TR_THONGKE_SOKHOI_DDH, Tr_DEXUAT_PHOI_INSERT
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_dexuat_bangmau, tr_dexuat_phoi, tr_dondathang, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_material, tr_nguyenlieu_gva, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_phieuyeucau, tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang_chitiet, tr_site
